profile.name: Danuson Cheounsanguan
profile.description: Software Developer with 5+ years of experience building web and mobile applications with React, Next.js, Node.js, and Flutter. Experienced shipping products from initial development through production

experience.overview: Software Developer working across web and mobile, with a growing focus on the bigger picture, such as business requirements, cross-team collaboration, and process improvements alongside hands-on coding.
keyContributions: Took ownership of ambiguous goals, proactively identifying the best approach and balancing scope, quality, and deadline tradeoffs to deliver results.
Built and maintained core marketplace functionality including listings, search, filtering, sorting, and pagination used by buyers and sellers in production.
Built and maintained mental health mobile app, from initial build through release, including real-time Firebase push notifications to keep users engaged without manual follow-up.
Designed and implemented the complete authentication system, including email/password, Google Sign-In, Apple Sign-In, OTP verification, password recovery, and account linking.
Worked closely with Design, BA, PM, QA, and backend engineers, giving feedback and suggestions and responding quickly whenever needed.
Picked up deployment and infrastructure workflows (Docker, Railway), including separate development, staging, and production branches with environment-specific configs.
Delivered feature work and issue fixes sprint by sprint, tracked and managed through ClickUp.
Deployed mobile apps to the App Store and Google Play Console.

experience.overview: Designed and developed a multi-listing application integrating the eBay API to automate bulk listing workflows for a family business, reducing repetitive manual work.
keyContributions: Designed and built a multi-listing tool integrated with the eBay API.
Built the UI with React and Material UI for fast, simple bulk listing.
Owned the project end-to-end as a solo developer, from problem definition to implementation.

experience.overview: Frontend Developer building a React-based CMS for a supply chain service, focused on data visualization, validation, and performance.
keyContributions: Built visualization and validation features for a supply chain CMS using React and D3.js.
Improved application performance by optimizing client-side caching strategies.
Worked directly with clients through weekly meetings to gather requirements and report progress.
Supported urgent production deployments and critical fixes under tight deadlines.

experience.overview: Frontend Developer on a telemedicine app enabling remote video/voice consultations, in a small two-person dev team with direct client contact.
keyContributions: Built the frontend of a telemedicine platform using Next.js.
Implemented real-time video and voice communication using WebRTC.
Communicated directly with clients to clarify requirements and gather feedback.
